symptom.rerunResult: same failure before any step starts

mostLikely: GitHub Actions included quota exhausted for the private repository owner
No valid payment method available after quota exhaustion
GitHub Actions budget or spending limit blocks additional usage
alsoCheck: Repository Settings > Actions > General permits workflow execution
Account billing is not locked or past due
GitHub Status has no active Actions incident
lessLikely: Individual workflow syntax or application code failure

recoveryExitCriteria: A minimal ubuntu-latest job starts and exposes at least one step
PR #42 apply workflow commits generated bundle changes
All required checks are rerun on the latest head SHA
